case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. NEWSOM, BOBBY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWSOM, BOBBY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWSOM, BOBBY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH ST #230, STAYED UNTIL JUL-18-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR $963 BACK RENT & DAMAGES & $80 COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
